speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi
text: Mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi, bas yehi dimag mein chal raha hai. Bedridden bapu ki seva, khet ka karza, aur hospital ka kharcha sab mere kandhe pe hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se farz aur zimmedari ka bojh seedha mirror karna.
text: Tum poore ghar ka farz akela uthaye khade ho, jahan rukna tumhe gunaah jaisa lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi
text: Haan, doctor bol ke nikal dete hain ki stress hai. Par mera rukna matlab ghar ki roti rukna, isliye lagta hai mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lagataar chalti lambi thakan ko pakadna.
text: Kaafi dinon se tum bina thehre chal rahe ho, isliye bojh har din aur bhaari hota ja raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi
text: Subah khet, dopahar bapu, raat hisaab-kitab. Saans lene ko pal nahi, par fir bhi lagta hai mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatement ke baad tumhare shabdon se sabse bhaari pal samajhna.
text: Din ka kaunsa pal sabse zyada daba deta hai, jab sharir aur mann dono saath chhodte lagte hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shaam ka waqt tod deta hai. Bapu ki dawa, pashu ka kaam, aur sahukar ka darr ek saath aa jata hai, tab lagta hai bilkul ruk nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk par warm line ke baad Lens C se rishton aur zimmedari ka tanav mirror karna.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari ho gaya. Tum ek saath bapu ki seva aur ghar ke bachav ka dabav jhel rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Meri asli dikkat ye hai ki sharir toot raha hai par rukna mana hai. Kaam chhodo to karza badhe, kaam karo to jaan nikalti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 ke hisaab se andar ki sharam aur tootan ko naam dena bina label ke.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut thak gaye ho, aur saath mein yeh bhi chubh raha hai ki madad maangna kamzori samjha jayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi
text: Bilkul wahi hai. Gaon mein bolein to log kahenge aadmi toot gaya, isliye muh band rakhta hoon aur sochta hoon mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Tumhari bhavna ko gaon aur caregiving ki haqeeqat se jod kar worth ko alag rakhna.
text: Itne bhaari haal mein tootna bilkul swabhavik hai, khaaskar gaon mein jab bimar buzurg ki seva aur rozi dono ek hi vyakti pe aa jaati hain. Tumhari keemat sirf isse nahi tol sakte ki tum kitna bojh uthaye ja rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par log kya kahenge ka darr bahut hai. Agar bolun ki nahi ho raha to bolenge bahane bana raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke turant baad chhoti restatement dekar surakshit jagah dena.
text: Tumhe darr hai ki sach bolte hi tum par ilzaam aa jayega...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi
text: Haan, isi liye chup rehta hoon. Andar se bas thakawat aur bojh, par upar se wahi chehra ki mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar samudayik pattern batakar tumhe akelapan se bahar laana.
text: Kisan parivaaron mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - ghar bachane ke chakkar mein aadmi apni thakan daba leta hai. Sirf tumhara nahi, par koi bolta nahi kyunki izzat aur zimmedari ka bojh bahut tez hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, samajh aa raha hai. Ab kya karoon jo farz bhi chale aur main poori tarah na tootun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 chhote upay dena jo roj ke farz mein fit ho sakein.
text: Teen chhote upay rakhte hain: (1) Bapu ko dawa dene ke baad 3 minute chup baith kar gehri saans. (2) Raat ko ek line likho - aaj sabse bhaari kaam kaunsa tha. (3) Shaam se pehle kaam ka 2-bindu kram bana lo, taaki dimag mein bheed kam ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh kar sakta hoon. Chhota kadam lag raha hai, extra bojh nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek upay ko seedhe kadam dar kadam chalne layak banana.
text: Pehle phone ya ghadi mein shaam ka chhota alarm lagao: 3 minute viram. Phir dawa dene ke turant baad baitho, kandha dheela karo, 10 saans dheere lo. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh karne layak lagta hai. Isme kaam rukega bhi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe dekar swayam-dosh kam karna.
text: Jab bimari ki dekhbhal, khet ka kaam, aur karza ek saath aata hai, tab thakawat vyakti ki kami nahi hoti, poori paristhiti ka dabav hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh baat sunkar halka laga. Har cheez meri galti nahi hai, dabav sach mein bada hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se self-blame se bahar aane ka badlav pakadna.
text: Ab tum dekh pa rahe ho ki bojh paristhiti ka hai, tumhari niyat ya himmat ki kami ka nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi, ab thoda niyantran mehsoos ho raha hai. Chhote viram se dimag halka ho sakta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Pragati ko pakka karna aur dheere chalne ko uchit batana.
text: Yeh bahut mazboot kadam hai. Farz chhode bina apni saans bachana samajhdari hai, kamzori nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj baat karke halka lag raha hai. Seene ka dabav pehle se kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se aaj ke badlav ko samay se jod kar stable karna.
text: Aaj ke din mein hi tumne antar mehsoos kiya, matlab yeh chhota viram tum par asar kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main isko roz ka kram banaunga. Alarm aur raat ki ek line pakka karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do aur sujhav dena jo 10 minute se kam aur duty-friendly hon.
text: Do aur chhote sujhav: (1) Har dawa ke baad 4 ghunt pani pakka. (2) Shaam ke kaam se pehle 2 kaam hi likho - bas wahi pe dhyan, baaki baad mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh dono ghar mein fit ho jayenge. Isse uljhan kam hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Dusra aur antim systemic reframe dekar lagatar chhote kadam ko maayne dena.
text: Aise bhaari jeevan mein sudhar bade aaram se nahi, chhote-dohraye hue viram se hota hai. Tum wahi raasta pakad rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dhanyavaad, pehli baar laga kisi ne meri baat sach mein suni.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se sunay jaane ki zarurat ko rishton ke sandarbh mein mirror karna.
text: Tumhare liye yeh zaruri tha ki koi tumhe sirf kaam karne wale haath nahi, ek insaan ke roop mein dekhe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab mann thoda sambhal raha hai. Ghabrahat utni tez nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naye santulan ko reinforce karna bina perfect hone ka dabav diye.
text: Yahi sahi raftaar hai. Dheere par lagatar kadam hi tumhe lamba sahara denge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lag raha hai main sambhal lunga. Farz bhi nibh jayega aur saans bhi bachi rahegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se farz aur swayam-sambhal ko ek saath chalne layak dikhana.
text: Tum ab farz chhode bina apni taqat bachane ka tareeka pakad chuke ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aaj ke liye itna kaafi lag raha hai. Sir halka mehsoos ho raha hai.

text: Tum bete ka farz itna poora kar rahe ho ki apni hadh se aage nikal kar bhi ruk nahi pa rahe.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main machine ki tarah chal raha hoon
text: Haan, kyunki ruk gaya to log bolenge beta laawarish chhod diya. Isliye main machine ki tarah chal raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lambe samay ki mushaqqat aur jama thakan reflect karna.
text: Yeh roz-roz ka lamba daur hai jisme mushaqqat ruk hi nahi rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah se raat tak kaam hi kaam hai. Kabhi lagta hai rukna gunaah hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad sabse bhaari pal ko tumhare shabdon mein samajhna.
text: Din ka kaunsa waqt tumhe sabse zyada tod deta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shaam mein jab baap ka haal dekh ke safai karta hoon aur karze ka hisaab yaad aata hai tab toot jata hoon. Upar se log kya kahenge ka darr.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk pe warm line ke baad C7 context mein shame-of-needing-help reflect karna.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari ho gaya. Lagta hai tum bahut thak gaye ho, aur saath mein yeh bhi ki agar tumne apni takleef boli to log tumhe kamzor maan lenge.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: doctor ne phir stress bol diya
text: Haan, doctor ne phir stress bol diya. Isliye lagta hai meri baat ka koi bhaav hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke turant baad short restatement dekar hold karna.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ki tumhari takleef ko baar-baar halka kar diya ja raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main machine ki tarah chal raha hoon
text: Bilkul. Bas kaam karta rehta hoon, main machine ki tarah chal raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Rural caregiving reality ko validate karke worth ko output se alag karna.
text: Is tarah ki sthiti mein, jab bimaar buzurg ki dekhbhal aur karza saath ho, aisi thakan bilkul swabhavik hai. Tumhari keemat sirf itne se nahi ki tum kitna dard chhupa kar kaam kar pa rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, sab andar dab gaya hai. Bolne ka mann karta hai par rokh leta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic pattern share karke akelapan kam karna.
text: Kisan parivaaron mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - bete caregiving aur karze ke beech khud ko bilkul pichhe kar dete hain. Sirf tumhara nahi, par koi bolta nahi kyunki log kya kahenge ka bojh bahut tez hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon jo farz bhi chalta rahe aur main poora na tootun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 micro-options dena jo duty-fit aur short hon.
text: Teen chhote options: (1) Safai ke turant baad 2 minute baithkar 8 dheemi saans. (2) Raat ko ek line likho - aaj sabse bhaari pal kaunsa tha. (3) Subah do hi kaam fix karo, baaki list baad mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh chhota hai aur mumkin lag raha hai. Isse routine bhi nahi tootega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek suggestion ko step-by-step simple form mein anchor karna.
text: Pehle shaam ka chhota alarm lagao: 2-minute viram. Phir safai ke baad baitho, kandhe dheele karo, 8 dheemi saans lo. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ho jayega. Isme extra bojh nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe dekar self-blame reduce karna.
text: Jab caregiving ka kathin kaam, karza aur rozi saath ho, tab dimag ka bhar jana vyakti ki kami nahi, paristhiti ka prabhav hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunkar halka laga. Har cheez meri hi galti nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se blame-shift ko mirror karna.
text: Ab tum dekh rahe ho ki dabav haalaton ka hai, tumhari kami ka nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi hai, thoda sahara mil gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress ko validate karke realistic pace reinforce karna.
text: Yeh bahut grounded progress hai. Tum farz ke beech bhi apni saans ke liye jagah bana rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj baat karke halka feel ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se aaj ke shift ko time-bound progress banana.
text: Aaj ke andar jo halka-pan aaya hai, woh batata hai ki chhote viram ka asar ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, isko roz follow karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do quick add-ons dena jo duty routine mein seedhe fit ho.
text: Do aur tiny steps: (1) Har do ghante paani ke 4 ghunt. (2) Shaam se pehle 60 second kandha dheela karke saans seedhi karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh fit baith raha hai. Kaam ke beech ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second systemic reframe se micro-recovery ko normalize karna.
text: Aise bhaari daur mein sudhar bade break se nahi, chhote aur dohraye hue thehraav se aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dhanyavaad, pehli baar laga koi samajh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se seen-and-understood need ko mirror karna.
text: Tumhare liye yeh zaruri tha ki koi tumhara bojh dekh kar usse maan de.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab thoda theek lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Steady calm ko reinforce karna bina perfect pressure ke.
text: Yahi pace sahi hai. Dheere par lagatar kadam tumhe lambi race mein sambhale rakhenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lagta hai sambhal lunga. Farz bhi chalega aur main bhi tikunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty aur self-stability ko ek saath reflect karna.
text: Tum farz nibhaate hue bhi ab apni taqat bachane ka tareeka jaan gaye ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, aaj ke liye itna kaafi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se aaj ki closure ko kal ki continuity se jodna.
text: Aaj ka yeh thehraav kal ke din ko halka shuru karne mein madad karega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal se pakka is routine ko chalaunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close pe do tiny next steps dekar action lock karna.
text: Kal ke liye do kaam: shaam ka 2-minute viram alarm, aur raat ki ek line - aaj sabse bhaari pal kaunsa tha. Itna hi kaafi hai.
